description: extract selected metadata from one DICOM file and flag standard-tag PHI presence (read-only)
rules: read-only — reads one DICOM header (stop_before_pixels), never modifies the input
emits JSON: transfer_syntax, modality, grouped study/series/image, phi_present, phi_tags_found, phi_scope_disclaimer
NOT a de-identifier — flags standard-tag PHI presence only; does not remove or modify data
usage: Set DICOM_PATH (absolute path to one .dcm file). Output: metadata.json.
limitation: Small PS3.15-inspired standard-tag subset only; not a complete Basic Application Confidentiality Profile. Private tags not checked. Burnt-in pixel PHI not detected. Multi-frame handling minimal. Not for clinical deployment, regulatory de-identification, autonomous diagnosis, or patient-facing use.
